arts.ttl: Manchester United receive Viktor Gyokeres 'boost' that could help beat Arsenal in summer transfer battle
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly receive a boost in the pursuit of Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres, who is said to also be a target of Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres set for Arsenal: Gunners 'best placed' to seal €70m deal
arts.sum: Arsenal are 'best placed' to secure the signing of Viktor Gyokeres this summer, according to Portuguese media. Arsenal, Chelsea and Man Utd all desperately need a striker, so their interest in Gyokeres is unsurprising.

arts.ttl: Victor Gyokeres' surprising release clause emerges to put Arsenal and Liverpool on red alert
arts.sum: Premier League clubs are said to be queuing up to sign Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres and there should be huge interest in the red-hot forward this summer

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Gyokeres deal SOON, Messi comparisons and ‘mini-Salah’ move
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Gyokeres deal SOON, Messi comparisons and ‘mini-Salah’ move Another area where Arsenal are targeting a new recruit in the summer is goalkeeper – with Espanyol shot-stopper Joan Garcia emerging as the player the Gunners want to compete with David Raya for the gloves.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Viktor Gyokeres' surprisingly low release clause, which will spark huge transfer chase for Europe's top goalscorer... and the Premier League club 'best placed' to win his signature
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres' name has been linked with a magnitude of clubs since he joined Sporting and that will only increase following the revelation of his supposed release clause.
